title: Furry Fables Interactive Dog Squeaky Toy, Plush Dog Toy, Picnic Box with Squeaker and Crinkle Paper, Detachable Plush Toy with Treat Pockets, Mental Stimulation Game for Small and Medium Dogs
features: INTERACTIVE DESIGN: Plush picnic box toy featuring multiple engaging elements including squeakers and crinkle paper for enhanced playtime
MENTAL STIMULATION: Detachable components and hidden compartments encourage problem-solving and keep dogs mentally engaged
SENSORY FEATURES: Includes various textures, sounds, and interactive elements like a squeaky plush croissant and removable play pieces
SIZE SUITABLE: Perfect dimensions for small to medium-sized dogs, compact enough for indoor/outdoor play yet engaging enough for extended sessions
DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: Made with quality plush materials, featuring secure stitching and multiple play components for lasting entertainment

TIPS: – These squeaky plush toys are NOT indestructible, thus NOT suitable for aggressive chewers. We recommend supervised play, and timely replacement of the broken ones. Be careful not to let your dog swallow the broken toy. – It is recommended to dry naturally after hand washing with neutral detergent or detergent for pets in lukewarm water.
description: Product description Introduce your furry friend to the delightful BACONBOX Interactive Dog Puzzle Toy, a charming plush picnic box that combines play with mental enrichment. This cleverly designed toy features multiple engaging elements including squeakers and crinkle paper, perfect for keeping your small to medium-sized dog entertained. The picnic box design includes adorable details like a plush croissant which has a sewed-in squeaker and treat pockets, checkered blanket, and various interactive components that encourage exploration and play. The detachable elements provide different textures and sounds, helping to maintain your pet's interest while stimulating their natural instincts. Each piece is thoughtfully crafted to create an engaging sniff-and-find experience that can help prevent boredom and provide hours of entertainment. The compact size makes it ideal for indoor/outdoor play sessions, while the plush construction ensures a gentle play experience. This interactive puzzle toy offers a wonderful way to bond with your pet while providing them with both physical activity and mental stimulation. Directions NOT for aggressive chewers, please keep it away from your pet once damaged or torn.

specifications_table.Included Components: Detachable Plush Picnic Basket, Squeaky Plush Croissant, Unfolded Sandwich With Crinkle Paper
specifications_table.Manufacturer: Jinhua Jinhan Pet Toy and Clothing
specifications_table.Product Warranty: Full Refund for Damage or Defect Upon Arrival
